name: QA Security Scan
_comment: Track H migration: was Webhook -> GPT-4o (hardcoded) -> Format -> GitHub issue + Slack (5 nodes). Now Webhook -> Brain (persona_pin=qa). QA PersonaSpec routes to Sonnet (security work warrants it), Brain posts to #qa. GitHub issue creation can be added later as a Brain tool call; not included in this wave to keep wiring minimal.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organization_id: 'paperwork-labs', message: $json.body.message || 'Run a security audit on the latest changes. Return critical_issues, high_issues, medium_issues, test_cases, and pre-merge checklist.', user_id: $json.body.user_id || 'n8n-qa-security-scan', channel: 'n8n', request_id: ($workflow.id + '-' + Date.now()), persona_pin: 'qa', slack_channel_id: 'C0ALLEKR9FZ', slack_username: 'QA', slack_icon_emoji: ':detective:' }) }}
